steps.title: What size property are you moving from?
steps.subtitle: This helps us estimate the size of the move.

steps.title: Where are you moving from?
steps.subtitle: Enter your current postcode or address.

steps.title: Where are you moving to?
steps.subtitle: Enter your destination postcode or address.

steps.title: Do you need any additional services?
steps.subtitle: Select any that apply.

steps.title: When are you planning to move?
steps.subtitle: Choose the option that best fits your situation.

steps.title: Your estimated moving cost
steps.subtitle: Based on property size and selected services.

steps.title: Confirm your move
steps.subtitle: Leave your details and we’ll confirm your quote.

steps.title: Thank you
